geminiApiKey.title: Gemini API Key (Free)
geminiApiKey.description: Your free Google Gemini API key. Get it at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey — no credit card needed.

resendApiKey.title: Resend API Key (Free)
resendApiKey.description: Your free Resend.com API key. Sign up at https://resend.com → API Keys → Create API Key.

recipientEmail.title: Your Email Address
recipientEmail.description: Where to send the daily job digest. Must match your Resend signup email.

dryRun.title: Dry Run (skip email)
dryRun.description: If true, scrapes and ranks jobs but does NOT send email. Use this to test first.
